summary: Completed backend API and frontend testing of new Stories, Explore, and Save/Bookmark features. Backend: 31/32 tests passed (97% success). All Stories endpoints working EXCEPT delete story has a route conflict. All Explore and Saved endpoints working. Frontend: Explore page renders correctly with search bar, category tabs, and 3-column grid.

critical.issue: Route conflict: server.py has old delete_story route (line 1832) that queries db.posts with type='story', but new routes/stories.py stores stories in db.stories collection. Old route takes precedence, causing 404 'Story not found' errors.

issues: On mobile, 'Reels' tab text is cut off due to horizontal scroll. Consider shorter labels or wider spacing.

action_items: CRITICAL: Remove conflicting delete_story route from server.py (line 1832). The new routes/stories.py uses db.stories collection, but server.py route queries db.posts with type='story'.
Consider improving mobile category tabs layout to show all tab labels without truncation
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 1832: Old @api_router.delete('/stories/{story_id}') conflicts with new stories router - queries db.posts instead of db.stories
routes/stories.py correctly uses db.stories collection for the new Stories feature
routes/explore.py correctly implements search, for-you feed, trending, and suggested users
routes/saved.py correctly implements save/unsave toggle and collections feature
Explore.jsx properly implements search bar, category tabs, and grid layout with correct data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Created test stories during API testing (auto-cleaned by test cleanup fixture)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Stories, Explore, and Save/Bookmark features tested. All APIs working except DELETE /api/stories/{story_id} has route conflict (needs server.py fix). Frontend Explore page verified working on both desktop and mobile. WebSocket connection warnings appear on load but are non-blocking.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: DELETE /api/stories/{story_id} returns 404 even for existing stories
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Route conflict between server.py (line 1832) and routes/stories.py. server.py has old delete route that queries db.posts collection with type='story' filter, but new Stories feature stores data in db.stories collection. FastAPI registers routes in order, so server.py route takes precedence.
reproduction_steps: 1. Create story via POST /api/stories?token=xxx (creates in db.stories collection)
3. Returns 404 'Story not found' because server.py queries db.posts, not db.stories
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove or comment out the delete_story route in server.py (line 1832-1847) to allow routes/stories.py to handle story deletion
